name: redteam-coding-factory
description: Autonomous coding factory — picks GitHub issues, implements fixes across Java/Spring AI/TypeScript/Python/Mobile, opens PRs. Works as a standalone tool, OpenClaw skill, or Claude Code MCP plugin.
